scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n bridge,server,web -c green,blue,magenta "python -m uvicorn python_bridge.app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001 --reload" "npm run dev --workspace server" "npm run dev --workspace web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace server && npm run build --workspace web
scripts.start: concurrently -k -n bridge,server,web -c green,blue,magenta "python -m uvicorn python_bridge.app.main:app --host 127.0.0.1 --port 8001" "npm run start --workspace server" "npm run start --workspace web"
scripts.test: npm run test --workspace server && npm run test --workspace web
scripts.lint: npm run lint --workspace server && npm run lint --workspace web
